title: New install -launching prompts for password
author: johnm65
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
I downloaded mRemoteNG, tried to launch it but I am prompted for a password in a dialog box. Is there a default password?

When I click "Cancel" on the Password dialog box the error below comes up.




## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggesting a change/improvement, tell us how it should work -->

## Current Behavior
<!--- If describing a bug, tel...

iterations.description: The application unexpectedly prompts for a password on new installs when leftover or incomplete SQL server configuration in the registry causes it to attempt an SQL connection without sufficient details.

comments.author: johnm65
comments.snippet:
This is the password Dialog that comes up.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: Seems you on first run accept to encode and encrypt and its set a password, so on next run its ask for such master password to get access to connection data. If you don't remember or don't know just delete connection.xml and restart app.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The application unexpectedly prompts for a password on new installs when leftover or incomplete SQL server configuration in the registry causes it to attempt an SQL connection without sufficient details.
Approach: Modify OptRegistrySqlServerPage.cs to check if SQL Server usage is enabled via registry but essential connection parameters (host, database name, user) are missing or invalid. If so, default UseSQLServer to false to prevent the unexpected password prompt.
